title: Rugby practice held for schoolgirls at Hillcrest grounds
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A successful rugby...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A successful rugby coaching session was held for schoolgirls at Hillcrest Secondary School in Mossel Bay.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A successful rugby coaching session was held for schoolgirls at Hillcrest Secondary School in Mossel Bay."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"SWD Rugby community coach Stanley Kama is working to promote schoolgirl rugby in the Mossel Bay area and encourages schoolgirls to come to practice sessions to see what rugby is about.","html":"SWD Rugby community coach Stanley Kama is working to promote schoolgirl rugby in the Mossel Bay area and encourages schoolgirls to come to practice sessions to see what rugby is about."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He was joined by fellow coach Nonkosinathi Mtikitiki at the session on Wednesday, 12 February.","html":"He was joined by fellow coach Nonkosinathi Mtikitiki at the session on Wednesday, 12 February."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"See photo gallery: SWD Rugby is holding regular practices for schoolgirls"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ruschnea van Aardt, a teacher at Hillcrest, helped organise the practice.","html":"Ruschnea van Aardt, a teacher at Hillcrest, helped organise the practice."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you would like to play rugby, contact Kama (081 090 6923), Mtikitiki (084 463 8621) or Van Aardt (063 130 8125).","html":"If you would like to play rugby, contact Kama (081 090 6923), Mtikitiki (084 463 8621) or Van Aardt (063 130 8125)."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"See videos of the girls going through their paces below:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Rugby practice held for schoolgirls at Hillcrest grounds
